req.title: Hr-Admin updates leave-request
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to update a leave-request through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers UI-driven update of a leave-request by an hr-admin. Tests are designed using EP (valid full update), NEG (missing mandatory field → 400, unauthenticated → 401, forbidden role → 403), BVA (leave duration at boundary of 1 day), STC (leave-request transitions from PENDING → APPROVED state), and DT (combinations of role × authentication). Five tests are produced: positive EP, negative NEG for missing field, negative NEG for unauthenticated access, boundary BVA for 1-day leave, and state-transition STC for status change. Each test is self-contained via fixtures and helper placeholders.

tests.name: test_hr_admin_updates_leave_request_all_valid_fields
preconditions: An existing leave-request record exists with known ID
actions: Open the edit form for the existing leave-request
Fill all mandatory fields with valid values
expected: HTTP response 200 or 201 with entity id in body
Leave-request record reflects updated values in the UI
Audit record is written for the update action
trace: R-WEB-014: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_hr_admin_updates_leave_request_all_valid_fields(
    hr_admin_page: Page,
    existing_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
):
    page = hr_admin_page
    lr_id = existing_leave_request["id"]

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    <helper_fn: fill_leave_form>(page, {
        "reason": "Updated reason EP",
        "start_date": "2025-08-01",
        "end_date": "2025-08-05",
        "type": "annual",
    })
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    success_msg = page.locator("[data-testid='success-toast']")
    assert success_msg.is_visible()

    resp = api_client.get(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["id"] == lr_id
    assert body["reason"] == "Updated reason EP"

    audit = api_client.get(f"/audit?entity_id={lr_id}&action=update")
    assert audit.status_code == 200
    assert len(audit.json()["records"]) >= 1

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_leave_request_missing_mandatory_field_returns_400
preconditions: An existing leave-request record exists with known ID
expected: Form displays a validation error message for start_date
Leave-request record is NOT updated in the backend
trace: R-WEB-014: error pathway 400 on validation error
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_hr_admin_update_leave_request_missing_mandatory_field_returns_400(
    hr_admin_page: Page,
    existing_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
):
    page = hr_admin_page
    lr_id = existing_leave_request["id"]
    original_reason = existing_leave_request["reason"]

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date-input']", "")
    page.fill("[data-testid='reason-input']", "Should not persist")
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    error_msg = page.locator("[data-testid='error-start-date']")
    assert error_msg.is_visible()
    error_text = error_msg.inner_text()
    assert "required" in error_text.lower() or "invalid" in error_text.lower()

    resp = api_client.get(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.json()["reason"] == original_reason

    audit = api_client.get(
        f"/audit?entity_id={lr_id}&action=update&limit=1"
    )
    records = audit.json().get("records", [])
    assert len(records) == 0 or records[0]["reason"] != "Should not persist"

tests.name: test_unauthenticated_user_cannot_update_leave_request
preconditions: An existing leave-request record exists with known ID
actions: Attempt to navigate directly to /leave-requests/{id}/edit without authentication
expected: User is redirected to login page OR receives HTTP 401
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_unauthenticated_user_cannot_update_leave_request(
    unauthenticated_page: Page,
    existing_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
):
    page = unauthenticated_page
    lr_id = existing_leave_request["id"]

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")

    current_url = page.url
    is_redirected_to_login = "login" in current_url or "signin" in current_url
    has_401 = page.locator("text=401").is_visible() or \
               page.locator("text=Unauthorized").is_visible()

    assert is_redirected_to_login or has_401, (
        f"Expected login redirect or 401, got URL: {current_url}"
    )

    resp = api_client.put(
        f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}",
        json={"reason": "Unauthorized attempt"},
        headers={"Authorization": ""},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 401

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_leave_request_one_day_boundary_duration
preconditions: An existing leave-request record exists with known ID
System minimum leave duration is 1 day
actions: Set start_date and end_date to the same calendar date (1-day leave)
Fill all other mandatory fields with valid values
expected: Form submission succeeds with HTTP 200 or 201
trace: R-WEB-014: boundary — minimum leave duration of 1 day
R-WEB-014: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_hr_admin_update_leave_request_one_day_boundary_duration(
    hr_admin_page: Page,
    existing_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
):
    page = hr_admin_page
    lr_id = existing_leave_request["id"]
    boundary_date = "2025-09-15"

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    <helper_fn: fill_leave_form>(page, {
        "reason": "BVA one-day leave",
        "start_date": boundary_date,
        "end_date": boundary_date,
        "type": "annual",
    })
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    success = page.locator("[data-testid='success-toast']")
    assert success.is_visible(), "Expected success toast for 1-day boundary leave"

    resp = api_client.get(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["start_date"] == boundary_date
    assert body["end_date"] == boundary_date

    audit = api_client.get(f"/audit?entity_id={lr_id}&action=update")
    assert len(audit.json()["records"]) >= 1

tests.name: test_leave_request_state_transition_pending_to_approved
preconditions: An existing leave-request record exists with status PENDING
actions: Change the status field from PENDING to APPROVED
Fill all other mandatory fields with valid values
expected: HTTP 200 or 201 returned with entity id
Leave-request status changes from PENDING to APPROVED in the record
Audit record captures the state transition
trace: R-WEB-014: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_leave_request_state_transition_pending_to_approved(
    hr_admin_page: Page,
    pending_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
):
    page = hr_admin_page
    lr_id = pending_leave_request["id"]
    assert pending_leave_request["status"] == "PENDING"

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    <helper_fn: fill_leave_form>(page, {
        "reason": "STC approved transition",
        "start_date": pending_leave_request["start_date"],
        "end_date": pending_leave_request["end_date"],
        "type": pending_leave_request["type"],
        "status": "APPROVED",
    })
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    success = page.locator("[data-testid='success-toast']")
    assert success.is_visible()

    resp = api_client.get(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}")
    assert resp.status_code in (200, 201)
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["id"] == lr_id
    assert body["status"] == "APPROVED"

    audit = api_client.get(f"/audit?entity_id={lr_id}&action=update")
    records = audit.json()["records"]
    assert any(r.get("new_status") == "APPROVED" for r in records)

tests.name: test_non_hr_admin_role_forbidden_from_updating_leave_request
preconditions: User is authenticated as a role that is NOT hr-admin (e.g. employee)
An existing leave-request record exists with known ID
expected: UI denies access with a 403 Forbidden message or redirects to an access-denied page
No audit record for an update action is written
trace: R-WEB-014: error pathway 403 if role forbidden
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_non_hr_admin_role_forbidden_from_updating_leave_request(
    employee_page: Page,
    existing_leave_request: dict,
    api_client,
    employee_api_token: str,
):
    page = employee_page
    lr_id = existing_leave_request["id"]
    original_reason = existing_leave_request["reason"]

    page.goto(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}/edit")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")

    is_forbidden_page = (
        page.locator("text=403").is_visible() or
        page.locator("text=Forbidden").is_visible() or
        page.locator("text=Access Denied").is_visible()
    )
    is_redirected_away = "/leave-requests" not in page.url or "/edit" not in page.url
    assert is_forbidden_page or is_redirected_away, (
        f"Expected 403/redirect, got URL: {page.url}"
    )

    resp = api_client.put(
        f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}",
        json={"reason": "Forbidden attempt"},
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {employee_api_token}"},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 403

    current = api_client.get(f"/leave-requests/{lr_id}")
    assert current.json()["reason"] == original_reason
